# Onboarding Output

> **Status:** NOT YET GENERATED  
> This file is a placeholder. The Onboarding Agent (skill 25) generates the actual content
> when you run `CREATE [project]` or `AUDIT [project]` in the Copilot Chat.

---

## Expected Sections (generated at runtime)

1. **Mode indicator** — CREATE or AUDIT
2. **Input Inventory** — All provided input material with availability status
3. **Validation status** — REQUIRED items checked, ONBOARDING_BLOCKED items listed
4. **Codebase / Reference Scan Summary** — Repository structure, tech stack detection
5. **Tooling Status** — Available tools (Git, Node.js, TruffleHog, Canva API)
6. **Open INSUFFICIENT_DATA items** — Gaps to be resolved by downstream agents
7. **TOOLING_GAP items** — Missing tools that block Phase 5 (not Phases 1–4)
8. **Recommended additional input** — What would significantly improve quality

---

> To start: type `CREATE MyProject` or `AUDIT MyProject` in the Copilot Chat.
